title: Ender's Addons
description: Ender Addons is a mod that currently doesn't do much, as it's in alpha. But it is planned to add compatibility between mods, quality of life changes, and some doodads that might help you on your journey.
body:
Ender Addons is a mod that currently doesn't do much, as it's in alpha. But it is planned to add compatibility between mods, quality of life changes, and some doodads that might help you on your journey.

Features:
* Tooltips on armor pieces that show how much defense they have
* 2 Music Discs
* 4 New Recipes

Planned Features:
Fluid tanks, ex. a wood tank that would only hold 2-4 buckets, and you would be able to upgrade it through crafting.
